title: Evangelion Another impact
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion : Another impact             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Dec 31, 2015 2:56 pm Did anyone heard of this ? its a short, seems official, i would really love to see the next movie like that. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DNb0N_lfnrM making off https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TBPxBisW-us

[]: Re: Evangelion : Another impact             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:02 pm That was the twelfth (of 36) videos in Khara's Japan Animator Expo which ran from last autumn to this autumn, showcasing many individual talents under Anno's guidance. Read about it here . On the official site , the first two seasons (of three) can no longer be watched; but they can be found elsewhere.

[]: Re: Evangelion : Another impact             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:04 pm Yes, we have heard of it. It was apart of the Japan Animator Expo (more info here ) It was also directed by Shinji Aramaki who also directed this this and this Edit: Dang it, pwhodges ninja'd me

[]: Re: Evangelion : Another impact             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:52 pm so its just a show piece /? not canon ?

[]: Re: Evangelion : Another impact             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:53 pm Most would seem to agree yes (unless you imagine it as a nightmare Shinji is having about himself, shortly after the events of Q)

[]: Re: Evangelion : Another impact             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 31, 2015 3:56 pm ^^ Alas, so. Just like this -- http://animatorexpo.com/neongenesisimpacts/ or the earlier http://animatorexpo.com/untilyoucometome/

[]: Re: Evangelion : Another impact             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Dec 31, 2015 4:04 pm lol so maris eva did squash someone, lmao !!
